DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-01-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ILONA BRUSIL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAIN is off calendar as moot. On March 18, 2014, the Court struck plaintiff's complaint because plaintiff failed to pay the required fees. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
